result.summary: Stytch exposes authenticated REST APIs for authentication and workspace management, a public Connected Apps/OIDC discovery surface, and an authenticated remote MCP server.
result.description: Stytch provides authentication, authorization, and identity infrastructure for consumer and B2B applications. Its products include APIs for auth flows and workspace management, plus Connected Apps features for OAuth/OIDC and AI-agent integrations.

stytch_project_secret.label: Stytch project ID and secret
stytch_project_secret.setup: Sign up or log in to the [Stytch Dashboard](https://stytch.com/dashboard), then open **Project ID & API keys**. Copy your environment-specific `project_id` and `secret`. Use them together as HTTP Basic auth (`project_id` as username, `secret` as password`) for Stytch server-side API calls.

stytch_public_token.label: Stytch public token
stytch_public_token.setup: Log in to the [Stytch Dashboard](https://stytch.com/dashboard) and open **Project ID & API keys**. Copy the environment-specific `public_token`. Stytch documents this token for frontend SDK communication with the Stytch API.

variables.name: environment
variables.description: Use `https://api.stytch.com` for Live environments or `https://test.stytch.com` for Test environments.

variables.name: projectDomain
variables.resolveFrom: your Stytch project's default domain or branded custom domain
variables.description: Connected Apps uses your project domain, e.g. `https://{noun}-{verb}-{number}.customers.stytch.dev` or your configured custom domain.
